Inside Man (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $88,634,237Details
International Box Office $97,164,028
Worldwide Box Office $185,798,265
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $38,629,768
Total $38,629,768
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,954,945 (32.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,818 opening theaters/2,867 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $153,046,287

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 24th, 2006 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: August 8th, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language and some violent images
Running Time: 128 minutes
Franchise: Inside Man
Cast, crew, or production detail: Breaking the Fourth Wall
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Hostage, Inside Job, Nazis, Police Detective, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Imagine Entertainment, Brian Grazer Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
